tests.note: Failure in tests/test_config.py::test_load_pipeline_config_exposes_reproducible_workspace_metadata expects canonical main checkout path rather than this worktree path; not caused by Houroboros changes.

tests.command: Custom AST security scan for subprocess/network/shell/eval patterns in changed Python files

tests.result: Not run: No module named bandit

tests.command: Isolated manual CLI workflow in /tmp/opencode/hooo-qa-manual-local: hooo start -> turn -> seed -> run -> evaluate -> evolve -> status -> export
tests.result: All commands exited 0; final phase evolved; origin metadata preserved; 8 artifacts under temp workspace; export included run/status/interview/seed/artifacts.

tests.command: Isolated phase-order repro in /tmp/opencode/hooo-qa-order-repro: hooo start -> seed -> evolve
tests.result: All commands exited 0; final phase evolved despite missing execution_log.md, evaluation.md, and drift.md.

findings.summary: Workflow phase order is not enforced; evolve can skip execution and evaluation.
findings.reproduction: Use an isolated config, then run: PYTHONPATH=src python -m jinwang_jarvis.cli hooo start --config /tmp/opencode/hooo-qa-order-repro/pipeline.yaml --goal 'Repro missing phase gating'; PYTHONPATH=src python -m jinwang_jarvis.cli hooo seed --config /tmp/opencode/hooo-qa-order-repro/pipeline.yaml --run-id <id>; PYTHONPATH=src python -m jinwang_jarvis.cli hooo evolve --config /tmp/opencode/hooo-qa-order-repro/pipeline.yaml --run-id <id>. Expected rejection because run/evaluate were not completed; actual exit 0 and phase evolved.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit transition guards and tests: evaluate requires running/execution evidence; evolve requires evaluated or blocked with drift/evaluation artifacts.

findings.summary: Tests cover the happy path but not invalid transitions, alias execution, CLI error behavior, or partial artifact states.
findings.reproduction: Review tests/test_houroboros.py: only ordered start/turn/seed/run/evaluate/evolve path and docs existence are asserted.
findings.recommendation: Add negative tests for skipped phases, unknown run via CLI, direct hooo alias invocation, corrupted/partial artifacts, and post-seed turn behavior.

findings.summary: Execution is a deterministic placeholder that self-generates PASS evidence for all criteria.
findings.reproduction: Run normal CLI flow and inspect execution_log.md: it contains 'PASS evidence recorded for: <criterion>' for each acceptance criterion; evaluate passes by matching those strings.
findings.recommendation: For phase 2, define a real executor/evidence contract so evaluation cannot pass solely by string echo.

findings.summary: Origin metadata is sufficient for MVP thread reference but lacks richer resume/continuity fields.
findings.reproduction: status/export include platform, channel_id, thread_id, phase, artifacts, latest_drift; they do not include message ID, jump URL, actor/user ID, or next-action hint.
findings.recommendation: Add resume command hints and richer Discord origin metadata for phase 2 operator handoff.

findings.summary: Bandit is not installed in the local environment.
findings.reproduction: python -m bandit -q src/jinwang_jarvis/houroboros.py src/jinwang_jarvis/cli.py -> No module named bandit.
findings.recommendation: Install Bandit or another security scanner in CI/dev dependencies if it is a required gate.
